title: aspidosperma olivaceum
intro: Aspidosperma olivaceum, also known as the olive tree of the forest, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to the presence of the alkaloid quebrachine, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aspidosperma olivaceum include its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of malaria. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of extracts and tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, diarrhea, and other ailments.
